subtasks.description: Query SQL data warehouse to calculate average cost per active seat by product for Q4 2024 (Oct-Dec 2024), sorted descending by cost per seat

plan.cost_rationale: This is a single SQL aggregation task requiring joins across product and seat/cost tables with filtering by Q4 2024 date range and grouping by product. A mid-tier model (Sonnet 4.6) is appropriate because it requires multi-table joins and aggregation with sorting, but no complex CTEs or window functions. One subtask is sufficient—the query can compute average cost per active seat and sort in a single SQL statement. No reconciliation across sources is needed; no policy evaluation required.

output.sql: SELECT product, SUM(amount_usd) / NULLIF(SUM(daily_active_seats), 0) AS avg_cost_per_seat FROM consumption_facts WHERE fiscal_year = 2024 AND fiscal_quarter = 4 GROUP BY product ORDER BY avg_cost_per_seat DESC NULLS LAST
